evals.prompt: I'm working in a Hugo site at /workspaces/hugo-pico-theme/demo-site. Please use the /hugo-new-content skill to create a new article with the title "Getting Started with Hugo".
evals.expected_output: A new file is created at content/posts/2026/04/2026-04-getting-started-with-hugo/index.md inside the demo-site directory. The file has YAML front matter with title, date, draft: true, and tags: []. The skill confirms the file was created and shows its path.
expectations: The file content/posts/2026/04/2026-04-getting-started-with-hugo/index.md is created inside demo-site
The front matter contains title: getting started with hugo (or similar)
The front matter contains draft: true
The skill reports the created file path to the user

evals.prompt: I'm working in a Hugo site at /workspaces/hugo-pico-theme/demo-site. Use the /hugo-new-content skill to create a new article with the Japanese title "Hugo テーマのカスタマイズ方法".
evals.expected_output: The title is translated to an English slug (e.g., 'customizing-hugo-theme' or similar). A new file is created at content/posts/2026/04/2026-04-{english-slug}/index.md inside demo-site with proper front matter. The Japanese title is preserved in the front matter title field.
expectations: The created file path uses an English kebab-case slug (not Japanese characters)
The front matter title field contains the original Japanese title or an equivalent
The front matter contains draft: true
The skill reports the slug translation to the user

evals.prompt:
I'm working in a Hugo site at /workspaces/hugo-pico-theme/demo-site. There is a file at .claude/rules/hugo-new-content.md with the following content:

```
# hugo-new-content defaults
extension: .adoc
draft: false
```

Use the /hugo-new-content skill to create a new article with the title "My AsciiDoc Post".
evals.expected_output: The skill reads the rules file and uses extension .adoc and draft: false. A new file is created at content/posts/2026/04/2026-04-my-asciidoc-post/index.adoc with draft: false in the front matter.
expectations: The front matter contains draft: false (overridden from rules file)
The skill acknowledges reading the rules file or using the configured defaults
